Our Vision

Nurturing Extraordinary Minds

Arete International School is founded on the ancient Greek ideal of arete — the pursuit of excellence in all dimensions of human life. Nestled in the verdant heart of DLF Phase 5, our campus is a sanctuary of learning where intellectual curiosity, ethical character, and human excellence converge.

We believe every child carries within them an extraordinary potential. Our role is to illuminate it — through world-class teaching, a rich tapestry of experiences, and a community built on trust and aspiration.

Academic Rigour Holistic Growth Character First Global Outlook
Our Campus

A Thoughtfully Designed World

Spread across a lush 12-acre campus, every space at Arete has been designed to inspire — from solar-panelled green roofs to open learning courtyards, amphitheatres, and tree-lined walkways.

Sports Zone

Football, cricket, basketball & swimming

Academic Block

12 smart classrooms, 2 floors

Green Rooftops

Solar energy & rooftop gardens

Amphitheatre

Open-air performances & assemblies

Residential

Separate boys & girls hostels

Sustainability Zone

Eco-gardens & composting

Floor Plan

Every Space Serves a Purpose

Our detailed campus layout reflects our philosophy: no space is wasted, every zone has intention. From the yoga room to the podcast studio, from the chemistry lab to the sustainability garden — Arete is engineered for discovery.

Laboratories

Biology, Physics, Chemistry & Computer

Wellness

Yoga, counselling & first aid

Creative Rooms

Dance, music & singing studios

Library & Writing

Research & quiet thinking spaces

World-Class Infrastructure

Our Facilities

⚽
Sports & Athletics

Football ground with athletics track, basketball court, cricket ground, swimming pool, and a dedicated sports activity room.

🏛️
Academic Block

12 technology-enabled classrooms (Classes 1–12) with smartboards, plus an open amphitheatre for collaborative learning.

🔬
Science Laboratories

Dedicated Biology, Physics, Chemistry and Computer labs equipped with modern instruments and safety facilities.

🎭
Creative & Arts

Dance studio, music room with vocal and instrumental sections, and a stationery corner for visual arts.

🧘
Student Wellness

Yoga room, guidance & counselling room, students' common room, first aid, and a school café for daily nourishment.

🏠
Residential Hostel

Comfortable separate Boys' and Girls' hostels with round-the-clock supervision, housekeeping and pastoral care.

Learning Journey

Your Child's Pathway to Excellence

I
Foundational Years
Nursery — Grade 2

Building wonder, language, and the love of learning through play-based and experiential education.

II
Preparatory Years
Grade 3 — Grade 5

Developing core skills in literacy, numeracy, arts and science through structured inquiry.

III
Middle Years
Grade 6 — Grade 8

Cultivating critical thinking, interdisciplinary exploration and foundations of leadership.

IV
Secondary Years
Grade 9 — Grade 12

Preparing for global universities through rigorous academics, research and co-curricular mastery.

Our Philosophy
"Arete is not a destination but a way of being — the relentless, joyful pursuit of one's highest potential across every dimension of life."
— Arete International School, Founding Charter
01
Academic Excellence

Rigorous, internationally benchmarked curricula that challenge every learner to think deeper and reach further.

02
Character & Values

An unwavering commitment to integrity, empathy, resilience, and service as the foundation of every Arete graduate.

03
Global Citizenship

Preparing young leaders to navigate and shape our interconnected world with wisdom and purpose.

Begin Your Journey

Submit an enquiry and our admissions team will be in touch within 24 hours.

Admissions

How to Join Arete

01

Submit Enquiry

Fill the form and our admissions counsellor will schedule a personalised call with your family.

02

Campus Visit

Experience the school firsthand — meet faculty, tour facilities and attend a taster class.

03

Assessment & Interaction

An age-appropriate, holistic assessment designed to understand your child's strengths.

04

Welcome to Arete

Receive your offer letter and join a community dedicated to your child's lifelong excellence.
